2604.11104.title: Frugal Knowledge Graph Construction with Local LLMs: A Zero-Shot Pipeline, Self-Consistency and Wisdom of Artificial Crowds
2604.11104.paper_summary: This paper presents an empirical study of a multi-model zero-shot pipeline for knowledge graph construction and exploitation, executed entirely through local inference on consumer-grade hardware. We propose a reproducible evaluation framework integrating two external benchmarks (DocRED, HotpotQA), WebQuestionsSP-style synthetic data, and the RAGAS evaluation framework in an automated pipeline. On 500 document-level relations, our system achieves an F1 of 0.70 $\pm$ 0.041 in zero-shot, compared to 0.80 for supervised DREEAM. Text-to-query achieves an accuracy of 0.80 $\pm$ 0.06 on 200 samples. Multi-hop reasoning achieves an Exact Match (EM) of 0.46$\pm$0.04 on 500 HotpotQA questions, with a RAGAS faithfulness of 0.96 $\pm$ 0.04 on 50 samples. Beyond the pipeline, we study diversity mechanisms for difficult multi-hop reasoning. On 181 questions unsolvable at zero temperature, self-consistency (k=5, T =0.7) recovers up to 23% EM with a single Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model, but the cross-model oracle (3 architectures x 5 samples) reaches 46.4%. We highlight an agreement paradox: strong consensus among samples signals collective hallucination rather than a reliable answer, echoing the work of Moussa{ï}d et al. on the wisdom of crowds. Extending to the full pipeline (500 questions), self-consistency (k=3) raises EM from 0.46 to 0.48 $\pm$ 0.04. A confidence-routing cascade mechanism (Phi-4 $\rightarrow$ GPT-OSS, k=5) achieves an EM of 0.55 $\pm$ 0.04, the best result obtained, with 45.4% of questions rerouted. Finally, we show that V3 prompt engineering applied to other models does not reproduce the gains observed with Gemma-4, confirming the specific prompt/model interaction. The entire system runs in $\sim$5 h on a single RTX 3090, without any training, for an estimated carbon footprint of 0.09 kg CO2 eq.
2604.11104.paper_summary_zh: 本論文提出了一項關於多模型零樣本管道的實證研究，用於知識圖譜的構建和利用，完全通過消費級硬體進行本地推理。我們提出了一個可重複的評估框架，整合了兩個外部基準（DocRED、HotpotQA）、WebQuestionsSP風格的合成數據以及RAGAS評估框架，並在自動化管道中實施。在500個文檔級關係上，我們的系統在零樣本中達到了0.70 $\pm$ 0.041的F1分數，而監督式DREEAM的F1分數為0.80。文本到查詢在200個樣本上達到了0.80 $\pm$ 0.06的準確率。多跳推理在500個HotpotQA問題上達到了0.46$\pm$0.04的精確匹配（EM），在50個樣本上，RAGAS的忠實度為0.96 $\pm$ 0.04。除了管道之外，我們還研究了針對困難多跳推理的多樣性機制。在181個在零溫度下無法解決的問題中，自我一致性（k=5, T =0.7）使用單一的專家混合模型（MoE）恢復了最高23%的EM，但跨模型的神諭（3個架構 x 5個樣本）達到了46.4%。我們突顯了一個協議悖論：樣本之間的強共識信號集體幻覺而非可靠答案，呼應了Moussa{ï}d等人對群眾智慧的研究。擴展到完整管道（500個問題），自我一致性（k=3）將EM從0.46提高到0.48 $\pm$ 0.04。一個信心路由級聯機制（Phi-4 $\rightarrow$ GPT-OSS, k=5）達到了0.55 $\pm$ 0.04的EM，這是獲得的最佳結果，其中45.4%的問題被重新路由。最後，我們顯示應用於其他模型的V3提示工程並未重現Gemma-4觀察到的增益，確認了特定提示/模型的互動。整個系統在單個RTX 3090上運行約5小時，無需任何訓練，估計碳足跡為0.09 kg CO2 eq.
2604.11104.author: Pierre Jourlin et.al.
